query:
INSERT INTO customers (userId, resellerId, status) 
SELECT u.id, r.id, 'active' 
FROM users u 
CROSS JOIN resellers r 
WHERE u.username = 'customer' AND r.companyName = 'Test Reseller Company' 
AND u.id NOT IN (SELECT userId FROM customers);
